sourceRef: tip:Getting ahead of a compliance survey two weeks out

slides.headline: Get ready for your compliance survey two weeks out
slides.body: Organize your COE documents for a smooth inspection.

slides.headline: Gather your Certificate of Eligibility (COE)
slides.body: Ensure all necessary COE documents are up-to-date and ready for review.
bullets: Save COE copies in a dedicated folder

slides.headline: Check the Yellow Ribbon Program
slides.body: Review your Yellow Ribbon Program documentation to ensure compliance.
bullets: Review the most recent Yellow Ribbon agreements

slides.headline: Verify your Chapter 33 forms
slides.body: Ensure all Chapter 33 forms are accurate and complete.
bullets: Review all student forms for accuracy

slides.headline: Review your 22-1999 forms
slides.body: Double-check your 22-1999 forms for any discrepancies.
bullets: Verify the 22-1999 against the SAA letter

slides.headline: Prepare for the inspection
slides.body: Have all necessary documents ready for the compliance survey.
bullets: Have a backup set of documents
Be prepared to answer any questions

slides.body: Start organizing your documents now. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Organize your COE, Yellow Ribbon, Chapter 33, and 22-1999 forms to be ready for your compliance survey two weeks out.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, which could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
